Traditional Chinese 
	大喬


	 Simplified Chinese 
	大乔


	 Pronunciation 
	Da Qiao 


	 Wade-Giles 
	Ta Ch‘iao

	 Birthplace 
	Lujiang

	 Name Notes 
	Da (大), in this context, translates to ‘Big’, thus ‘Elder’. Rather than refer to her as the ‘Older Qiao’, the name Da Qiao has become a popular alternative. Da Qiao and Xiao Qiao were names first used by Koei in Dynasty Warriors 3 when the characters were introduced. Note that Da4 and Xiao3 can still be used in this context in the modern-day family, and usually as the surname.

full_text:
Da Qiao 大喬
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Da Qiao (大喬)was born in Lujiang. Elder of Wu’s Qiao Sisters. Sister to Xiao Qiao. Married to Sun Ce. Da Qiao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.

Short Biography
Elder of Wu’s Qiao Sisters. Sister to Xiao Qiao. Married to Sun Ce.
Details
Traditional Chinese大喬
Simplified Chinese大乔
PronunciationDa Qiao
Wade-GilesTa Ch‘iao
BirthplaceLujiang
Name NotesDa (大), in this context, translates to ‘Big’, thus ‘Elder’. Rather than refer to her as the ‘Older Qiao’, the name Da Qiao has become a popular alternative. Da Qiao and Xiao Qiao were names first used by Koei in Dynasty Warriors 3 when the characters were introduced. Note that Da4 and Xiao3 can still be used in this context in the modern-day family, and usually as the surname.
